名.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 夕 (crescent moon) + 口 (mouth) — to say one's name to identify oneself in the dark.

真.wiki_summary: Wiktionary gives no explicit formation-type label but treats 真 as a phono-semantic compound, possibly connected with 貞 (OC *teŋ); no ideogrammic-compound analysis is given.
真.difference: Our data classifies 真 as compound_ideograph; Wiktionary treats it as phono-semantic compound with no support for an ideogrammic compound reading.

论.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 言 (speech) + phonetic 侖 (OC *run).

处.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 虍 + semantic 夂 + semantic 几 (table).
处.difference: Our data classifies 處 as compound_ideograph; Wiktionary classifies it as phono-semantic compound with 虍 as the phonetic component.

义.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 我 (OC *ŋaːlʔ) + semantic 羊 (signifying 'good/auspicious', not 'sheep').

各.wiki_summary: Ideogrammic compound: 夂 (sole of foot) + 口 — to come, to enter; original form of 格.
各.difference: Our data classifies 各 as phono_semantic_compound with 口 as phonetic; Wiktionary classifies it as ideogrammic compound with both 夂 and 口 as semantic components.

入.wiki_summary: Ideogram (指事): an arrowhead shape indicating 'to enter'.
入.difference: Our data classifies 入 as pictograph; Wiktionary classifies it as an ideogram/simple_indicative (指事).

几.wiki_summary: Wiktionary page is for trad 幾: Ideogrammic compound: 𢆶 (silk threads; little things) + 戍 (to guard against) — watching over the fine details.
几.difference: Our data classifies 幾 as pictograph (low table); Wiktionary classifies it as ideogrammic compound with a completely different semantic analysis.

认.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: semantic 言 (speech) + phonetic 忍 (OC *njɯnʔ).

条.wiki_summary: Phono-semantic compound: phonetic 攸 (OC *lɯw) + semantic 木.
